headline: GL Stock Near 52-Week High: A Signal for Investors to Hold Tight?
summary: Globe Life is set to grow on rising life and health premiums, stronger investment income and disciplined capital deployment.

headline: How a Breast Cancer Diagnosis Inspired Check for Cancer Champion Adamari López
summary: NORTHAMPTON, MA / ACCESS Newswire / May 11, 2026 /Originally published on Aflac Newsroom At just 33 years old, Adamari López was thriving in her career and had quickly become a household name. She was successful, happy, healthy and felt unstoppable. ...
